MetalSharp DXMT M12 runtime build artifacts

Source commit: a24464357fc0cb09ba794330d89d7dd6df9e2140
Source path: vendor/dxmt
Build command:
  METALSHARP_X86_LLVM_ROOT="$HOME/.cache/metalsharp/toolchains" \
    tools/d3d12-metal-sdk/scripts/m12-dev.sh build-runtime

These artifacts are the generated DXMT runtime files from the confirmed-good
Elden Ring M12 render build on 2026-07-01.
